label: 1557m to 1557o Repealed. , title V, § 542(a)(6),Aug. 26, 1954, ch. 93768 Stat. 861
notes: Section 1557m, , , required the President to submit an annual report to Congress. See .act June 5, 1950, ch. 220, title IV, § 41564 Stat. 208section 2394 of this title

Section 1557n, , , related to authorization for appropriations; original appropriation; and express or implied commitments. See .act June 5, 1950, ch. 220, title IV, § 41664 Stat. 208section 2404 of this title

Section 1557, , , defined the terms “technical cooperation programs,” “United States Government agency” and “international organization.” See .oact June 5, 1950, ch. 220, title IV, § 41864 Stat. 209section 2403 of this title
